steps.t: Dol Brannor can be found to north-west of Linhir in Dor-en-Ernil. Herion has asked you to patrol the beacon of Dol Brannor and defeat any of the Enemy…
Herion can be found in Linhir in eastern Dor-en-Ernil. You have crippled the forces at Dol Brannor, at least for the moment, and should now return to …
